para_trans: Officers of the Tehsildar Cadre
Change of post
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department
GOVERNMENT ORDER NO. CHANGE-2525 / PR. NO. 286 / AASTA-3
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai 400 032
Date: April 22, 2026
Reference: - The Maharashtra Regulation of Transfer of Government Employees and Prevention of Delay in discharge of Government Duties Act, 2005
The seat of government:
Regulation of transfers and discharge of government duties of Maharashtra Government employees.
In accordance with the provisions of Sections 4 (4) and 4 (5) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005, Shri S.S.
Handeswar, Tehsildar Pathri, G. Parbhani as per the complaint received against them.
for administrative reasons as well as in the interest of public service as may be agreed upon by the Authority; and
For administrative convenience, the post is being transferred under this order.
Installation orders will be issued separately in place of Handeshwar, Tehsildar.
2. The said order comes into force with immediate effect and shall be served on Shri S.S. Handeshwar, Tehsildar.
The office is being unilaterally relieved under this order. Also Mr. S.S. Handeshwar,
Government Circular until the Tahsildar issues a detailed order regarding his appointment,
Revenue and Forest Department, Govt. Join the concerned Collector's office as per the 01.12.2023 daily
Attendance must be recorded.
3. Divisional Commissioner, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar as Tehsildar Pathri, G. Parbhani.
The charge should be handed over to other functional officers today till further orders of the government.
The report should be submitted to the government.
4. This page is on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
